paper_title: Effect of Diatomaceous Earth and Poultry Manure on Corn and Wheat Yield

methods.description: The field experiment was designed to study the effect and aftereffect of various rates of diatomaceous earth from the Korzhevsky deposit and its combinations with poultry manure on the yield structure and productivity of corn and spring wheat.

steps.description: A field experiment was laid on a gray forest soil according to a specific scheme with different treatments.
steps.searchable_summary: set up field experiment with different treatments of diatomaceous earth and poultry manure

steps.description: The experiment was repeated three times, with plots placed by the method of randomized repetitions.
steps.searchable_summary: randomize and repeat field experiment plots three times

steps.description: Diatomaceous earth from the Korzhevsky deposit was used as a silicon-containing fertilizer with specific element content.
steps.searchable_summary: use diatomaceous earth from Korzhevsky deposit as fertilizer

steps.description: Poultry manure was used as organic fertilizer.
steps.searchable_summary: apply poultry manure as organic fertilizer

steps.description: Diatomaceous earth and poultry manure were introduced for the main tillage.
In the experiment, Ladoga 175 MV corn hybrid and Granny spring wheat were cultivated.
steps.searchable_summary: cultivate Ladoga 175 MV corn and Granny spring wheat
